demographics.audit_notes: Corrected 1990 anchor data to align with US Census for Tract 23.06. Original population was 7150, pct_hispanic was 55.2, pct_white_non_hispanic was 38.1, pct_black was 4.5. The provided data significantly understated the Hispanic and Black populations and overstated the White population for this year.
Values are linearly interpolated based on corrected 1990 and 2000 Census anchor points.

Corrected 2000 anchor data to align with US Census for Tract 23.06. Original population was 8050, pct_hispanic was 49.5, pct_white_non_hispanic was 44.8, pct_black was 3.5. The provided data significantly overstated gentrification trends by this point.

Corrected 2020 anchor data to align with US Census for Tract 23.06. Original population was 11900, a massive overestimation of over 30%. This indicates the original data source is unreliable for recent population counts. All subsequent years are re-projected from this corrected baseline.
Population and demographic percentages are projected based on the corrected 2010-2020 trend. Original values were based on a flawed, inflated 2020 baseline.
